text.title: api-contract-first Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-contract-first as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Updating the spec after the implementation is already deployed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spec becomes documentation-after-the-fact; it will drift from reality whenever implementation is changed without updating the spec.
